mapper.sql: m.id, m.object_key, m.original_name, m.media_type, m.extension, m.size_bytes, m.width, m.height, m.sha256, m.alt_text, CASE WHEN m.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND (a.cover_media_id = m.id OR INSTR(a.content_markdown, m.object_key) > 0) ) THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE m.status END AS status, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND (a.cover_media_id = m.id OR INSTR(a.content_markdown, m.object_key) > 0) ) AS reference_count, m.unreferenced_at, m.delete_attempts, m.next_delete_retry_at, m.last_delete_error, m.created_by, m.created_at, m.deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM media_asset m WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM media_asset WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM media_asset m WHERE m.id = #{id} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE media_asset SET reference_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND (a.cover_media_id = media_asset.id OR INSTR(a.content_markdown, media_asset.object_key) > 0) ), unreferenced_at = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND (a.cover_media_id = media_asset.id OR INSTR(a.content_markdown, media_asset.object_key) > 0) ) THEN NULL WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN #{now} WHEN unreferenced_at IS NULL THEN created_at ELSE unreferenced_at END, status = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND (a.cover_media_id = media_asset.id OR INSTR(a.content_markdown, media_asset.object_key) > 0) ) THEN 'ACTIVE' WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 'PENDING' ELSE status END WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN ('PENDING', 'ACTIVE', 'ORPHAN')
UPDATE media_asset SET status = 'ORPHAN' WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PENDING' AND reference_count = 0 AND unreferenced_at IS NOT NULL AND unreferenced_at <= #{cutoff}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM media_asset m WHERE (m.status = 'ORPHAN' AND m.deleted_at IS NULL) OR (m.status IN ('DELETE_FAILED', 'DELETING') AND m.next_delete_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.status = 'ORPHAN' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(m.next_delete_retry_at, m.unreferenced_at, m.created_at), m.id LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE media_asset SET status = 'DELETING', deleted_at = #{now}, delete_attempts = delete_attempts + 1, next_delete_retry_at = #{leaseUntil}, last_delete_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND (a.cover_media_id = media_asset.id OR INSTR(a.content_markdown, media_asset.object_key) > 0) )

UPDATE media_asset SET status = 'DELETING', deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, #{now}), delete_attempts = delete_attempts + 1, next_delete_retry_at = #{leaseUntil}, last_delete_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND ( (#{expectedStatus} = 'ORPHAN' AND deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND (a.cover_media_id = media_asset.id OR INSTR(a.content_markdown, media_asset.object_key) > 0) )) OR (#{expectedStatus} IN ('DELETE_FAILED', 'DELETING') AND next_delete_retry_at <= #{now}) )
UPDATE media_asset SET status = 'DELETED', next_delete_retry_at = NULL, last_delete_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DELETING'
